subcodes.first_line: O people of Bahá! Raise ye the pavilion of holiness upon the shore of this sea, unto which all seas flow [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا اهل البهاء ان ارفعوا سرادق القدس فی شاطی هذا البحر الذی الیه تذهب کل البحار
subcodes.subjects: @power of the Manifestation of God, @station of the Manifestation of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @proofs of the Manifestations of God
